response.justification: Despite a strong engineering background and exposure to distributed systems and AI tooling at Google and Meta, the candidate lacks demonstrable production experience in multi-agent AI systems for fintech, has no evidence of leading engineering teams at scale-up size, and shows no track record in regulated financial systems, credit risk, or working-capital automation — all core requirements for this role.
strengths: Experienced in distributed systems and real-time data pipelines at Google/Meta
Strong open-source contributions and technical depth in event-driven architectures
Proven ability to ship complex full-stack systems across multiple domains
concerns: No evidence of building or operating production multi-agent AI systems in fintech
Lacks leadership experience scaling teams from 10+ to 30+ engineers
No demonstrated experience with financial compliance, credit systems, or regulatory infrastructure
